modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Warning email received about returning rented books before finals.

full_description_text: User received an email notification regarding the return of rented books. This message arrived during a critical time as finals are approaching. The urgency of the situation is heightened by the upcoming exams. User is concerned about the return process and its timing.
short_description: Warning email received about returning rented books before finals.
description: User received an email notification regarding the return of rented books. This message arrived during a critical time as finals are approaching. The urgency of the situation is heightened by the upcoming exams. User is concerned about the return process and its timing.
